purpose: Frontend map cells selectable by date, AOI, product, metric and resolution.
grain: event_date + aoi_id + product_id + metric_id + resolution_km + grid_id

display_contract.note: raw_metric_value is retained for reconciliation; API and frontend use relative_score only

limitations: potential_fishing_score is an environmental suitability proxy
fishing_hours represents apparent fishing effort, not catch
